Home / Services / Irrigation Systems

Irrigation Systems

Keep your landscape healthy and hydrated with our efficient irrigation solutions.

A & A Landscaping specializes in designing, installing, and maintaining efficient irrigation systems for Boise homes and businesses. We understand the importance of proper irrigation for maintaining a healthy and vibrant landscape, especially in Boise's dry climate. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of irrigation systems, including sprinkler systems, drip irrigation, and smart controllers.

Our irrigation services include: System design, Installation, Repair, Maintenance, Winterization. We use high-quality components and expert craftsmanship to ensure your irrigation system is both reliable and efficient. We take into account factors such as water pressure, soil type, and plant needs to create a customized irrigation plan that meets your specific requirements.

Whether you need a new irrigation system installed or your existing system repaired, A & A Landscaping can help. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn how we can help you conserve water and keep your landscape healthy.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site assessment and water audit.
  2. 02 Step 2: Irrigation system design and planning.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation of irrigation components.
  4. 04 Step 4: System testing and calibration.

Benefits

  • Water conservation
  • Healthy and vibrant landscape
  • Reduced water bills
  • Convenient and automated watering

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of irrigation system is best for my landscape?

The best type of irrigation system depends on your landscape's specific needs and characteristics. We can help you determine the most efficient and effective system for your property.

How often should I water my lawn in Boise?

The frequency of watering depends on factors such as weather conditions, soil type, and grass type. We can help you develop a watering schedule that meets your lawn's specific needs.

Do you offer smart irrigation controllers?

Yes, we offer smart irrigation controllers that automatically adjust watering schedules based on weather conditions and plant needs. These controllers can help you conserve water and save money.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with irrigation systems? Contact us today.
